heading.en: Imperial Standard Hex Nuts: UNC/UNF for Export

body.en: Imperial standard hex nuts for export include UNC (Unified National Coarse) and UNF (Unified National Fine) thread forms in fractional sizes from 1/4" through 1-1/2". Export to markets using American standards (North America, Caribbean, Gulf states) requires nuts conforming to ASME B18.2.2 dimensions. Key sizes in stock: 1/4"-20 UNC, 5/16"-18 UNC, 3/8"-16 UNC, 7/16"-14 UNC, 1/2"-13 UNC, 5/8"-11 UNC, 3/4"-10 UNC, 7/8"-9 UNC, 1"-8 UNC/UNF. Our wholesale export line includes zinc-plated carbon steel, HDG carbon steel, and 304/316 stainless steel. Always match nut grade to bolt grade: Grade A194 2H (for ASTM A193 B7 bolts) is the standard heavy hex nut for high-temperature and pressure-containing applications. Related resources: high-tensile bolts anchor bolts stainless steel fasteners hex bolts lock nuts washers self-drilling screws socket screws. heading.en: DIN and GB Standard Nuts for International Export

body.en: DIN standard nuts (DIN 934 for standard hex nuts, DIN 6925 for flange nuts) are globally recognized and accepted in most export markets. The metric thread pitch must be specified: coarse (default) or fine. For structural bolting per EN 14399, specify heavy hex nuts with the exact proof load class. GB standard stainless steel hex nuts (GB/T 6170 for standard nuts, GB/T 6172 for thin nuts) are harmonized with ISO equivalents and are acceptable in most export destinations. For African export markets, many buyers accept GB or DIN interchangeably. Always verify with the local inspector or engineer if SABS, KEBS, or other local standard certification is required. Standards-based procurement requires continuous learning as ISO, ASTM, DIN, and GB standards are revised every 3-5 years. Subscribe to standards update notifications and review specifications annually. The most common standards used in international fastener trade are ISO 898-1 (mechanical properties), ISO 3506-1 (stainless), ISO 3269 (acceptance inspection), ISO 4042 (coatings), and ISO 1502 (thread gauges). For B2B buyers, building a standards reference library with at least the top 20 standards relevant to your product mix is essential. q.en: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.es: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.ar: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.fr: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.pt: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.ru: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.ja: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.de: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?
q.hi: What nut grade matches an 8.8 bolt?

a.en: Grade 8 (proof load 890 MPa) is the minimum match for 8.8 bolts. Heavy hex Grade 8 is preferred for structural connections.
a.zh: 8级（保证载荷890 MPa）是8.8螺栓的最低匹配。重型8级是结构连接的首选。

q.en: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.es: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.ar: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.fr: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.pt: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.ru: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.ja: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.de: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?
q.hi: Can GB and DIN nuts be used interchangeably?

a.en: Yes, GB and DIN metric nuts are harmonized under the ISO agreement and are dimensionally interchangeable. ISO 4032 replaces both DIN 934 and GB/T 6170.
a.zh: 是的，GB和DIN公制螺母在ISO协议下已协调，尺寸可互换。ISO 4032同时替代DIN 934和GB/T 6170。

For high-risk applications (load-bearing structural, pressure vessels, mining, marine), add fatigue testing, salt-spray testing (ASTM B117), torque-tension testing, and post-installation inspection. The cost of additional verification is 0.1-0.3% of order value, while undetected quality failures can be 10-100x the order value in damages.
